title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 12 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 12 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 12 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 12/01/2024
DCE iron ore futures open higher and go lower, futures fall today by 1.76%. the main contract I2405 closed 948.5.some traders were negative to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
